## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Superhuman's content marketing progress, recent acquisition, and future strategy with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Superhuman's organic traffic increased 30% in the last 3 months, with AI-related content performing well](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Superhuman was acquired by Grammarly; a major rebranding and product bundle launch is planned for October 6th](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [The team aims to focus on AI adoption for teams/businesses and capture AI budgets in their content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [GrowthX will adapt content strategy to align with new company direction and expanded product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)

## Topics

### Content Marketing Performance

  - [30% increase in organic traffic over the last 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Grammarly acquisition news drove \~1,000 visits over a 3-day span](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [4% monthly increase in top 10 keyword rankings (1,000 additional keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [AI-related content performing well, including stats-based articles](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [LLM referrals growing, with some content getting more LLM referrals than organic clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

### Acquisition and Rebranding

  - [Superhuman acquired by Grammarly; Coda also part of the new company structure](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Major rebranding and product bundle launch planned for October 6th](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [New overarching platform will include Superhuman (email), Grammarly (writing/grammar), and Coda (docs/collaboration)](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Potential SEO risks and seat growth challenges during transition](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Focus on AI adoption for teams and businesses](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Capture AI budgets across various industries](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Create content around "productivity stack" featuring all three products](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Align with five key areas: docs, communication/grammar, calendaring, email, and chat](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Potential collaboration on cross-product content (e.g., how to use Superhuman and Grammarly together)](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Team discussing implementation of Profound or Scrunch for AI/LLM analytics](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Need to track impact on seat growth from content marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Exploring options to create a dashboard showing signups, leads, and purchases from blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to review new ICP information and brainstorm content ideas aligned with new company direction](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Team to consider sharing vision deck with Elvis (pending NDA)](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Explore content opportunities around "ultimate tech stack for productivity" featuring all three products](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Investigate Grammarly and Coda's organic strategies for potential learnings](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Alex to work on setting up Profound or similar tool for better AI/LLM analytics](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Harmony to share more context and information as it becomes available regarding the acquisition and rebranding](https://fathom.video/share/tVjFwui2zDQZyckGTWDSzzykxvBoHRqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
